name: get_interfaces
description: Retrieve interface status, admin/oper state, MTU, port speed, and traffic counters for a SONiC switch. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-interfaces.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name.description: Optional interface name filter (exact match, e.g. 'Ethernet0').

name: get_ip_interfaces
description: List IPv4 and IPv6 address assignments per interface/subinterface for a SONiC switch. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-interfaces subinterfaces.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_routes
description: Retrieve the IPv4 routing table (with nexthops, protocol, distance, metric, uptime) from FRR via 'vtysh show ip route json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. When omitted, the default VRF is queried.

name: get_ipv6_routes
description: Retrieve the IPv6 routing table (with nexthops, protocol, distance, metric, uptime) from FRR via 'vtysh show ipv6 route json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. When omitted, the default VRF is queried.

name: get_bgp_summary
description: Retrieve BGP IPv4 and IPv6 peer summary (peer state, uptime, prefixes rcvd/sent, msg counts) from FRR via 'vtysh show ip bgp summary json' + 'show bgp ipv6 summary json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. Defaults to the default VRF.

include_ipv6.description: Include IPv6 peer summary. Defaults to true.

name: get_lldp_neighbors
description: Retrieve LLDP neighbors, local advertisement, and per-interface TX/RX statistics. Combines RESTCONF openconfig-lldp (primary) with lldpcli JSON over SSH (fallback + diagnostics). On SONiC VS, neighbor reception is known to be unreliable — the tool reports that explicitly when TX>0 and RX=0.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_vlans
description: List configured VLANs with IP assignment, member ports, and port-tagging mode. Source: 'show vlan brief' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_arp_table
description: Retrieve the ARP/IPv4-neighbor table with IP, MAC, interface, and VLAN. Source: 'show arp' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_portchannels
description: List configured port-channels (LAGs) with their protocol and member ports. Source: 'show interfaces portchannel' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_platform_detail
description: Combined platform health: summary + fans + temperatures + PSUs. Sources: 'show platform summary/fan/temperature/psustatus' over SSH. On SONiC VS, hardware sensors are absent; the tool reports that explicitly.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_sflow_status
description: Retrieve sFlow sampling configuration and status: global enabled flag, sample size, polling interval, collectors, and per-interface sampling. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-sampling-sflow.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_system_info
description: Retrieve SONiC build, kernel, platform, HwSKU, ASIC, serial, and uptime details via 'show version' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_system_info_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_system_info. Invokes get_system_info against every inventory device (or the provided list) in parallel and returns a merged envelope with per-switch results and ok/error counts.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs to target. When omitted, fans out to every device in the server's inventory.

name: get_interfaces_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_interfaces. Fans out get_interfaces across every inventory device (or the provided list) in parallel, returning a merged envelope with per-switch results and ok/error counts.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs to target. When omitted, fans out to every device in the server's inventory.

name.description: Optional interface name filter (applied on each switch, exact match).

name: get_bgp_summary_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_bgp_summary. Fabric-wide BGP peer state — which switches have sessions Established, how many peers, routes exchanged — all from one call.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

vrf.description: Optional VRF name (applied on each switch).

include_ipv6.description: Include IPv6 peer summary. Defaults to true.

name: get_routes_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_routes. IPv4 routing tables from every switch in one call — useful for 'who reaches what' diagnosis.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: get_lldp_neighbors_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_lldp_neighbors. Fabric-wide LLDP topology — on real hardware, this is the 'who is connected to whom' view. On SONiC VS, every switch will show RX=0 (documented limitation).

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: get_vlans_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_vlans. VLAN configuration across every switch — useful for L2 consistency checks.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: set_interface_admin_status
description: Bring a single interface administratively up or down on a SONiC switch. Reads pre-state via RESTCONF, runs 'sudo config interface startup|shutdown <iface>' via SSH, waits for SWSS to reprogram, then reads post-state. Mutation is recorded in the server-side mutation ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: set_interface_mtu
description: Change the MTU (bytes) of a single interface on a SONiC switch. Reads pre-state via RESTCONF, runs 'sudo config interface mtu <iface> <mtu>' over SSH, waits for SWSS to reprogram, then reads post-state. MTU range 68..9216. Mutation recorded in the ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: set_interface_description
description: Set (or clear) the description/alias on a single SONiC interface. Cosmetic only — no forwarding or control-plane impact. Writes directly to CONFIG_DB via sonic-db-cli because SONiC master removed 'config interface description' from the CLI. Input is strictly sanitised (alphanumerics + safe punctuation only, no quotes/backslashes).

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

description.description: New description (<= 256 chars, safe punctuation only). Pass an empty string to clear.

name: clear_interface_counters
description: Reset interface traffic counters (in/out pkts, errors, discards) via 'sonic-clear counters' over SSH. Resets every Ethernet interface at once on this SONiC build — no per-interface argument is supported. Zero impact on forwarding; common troubleshooting step.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: add_vlan
description: Create a VLAN (1..4094) on a SONiC switch via 'sudo config vlan add <vid>'. Pre/post existence is verified via sonic-db-cli against CONFIG_DB. Mutation is recorded in the ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: remove_vlan
description: Delete a VLAN on a SONiC switch via 'sudo config vlan del <vid>'. SONiC refuses to remove a VLAN that still has attached L3 interfaces or members — the tool surfaces that as an error rather than forcing.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: config_save
description: Persist the current SONiC CONFIG_DB to /etc/sonic/config_db.json via 'sudo config save -y'. Safe — no network impact — but classified MUTATION because it changes on-disk state. Use this after any config change to make it survive reboot.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_mutation_history
description: Return recent entries from the server-side mutation ledger. Read-only view of every MUTATION or DESTRUCTIVE tool invocation: timestamp, tool, switch, inputs (with secrets redacted), pre/post state, status.

limit.description: How many most-recent entries to return. 1..500. Default 50.

switch_ip.description: Optional: filter to entries against this switch.

tool.description: Optional: filter to entries for this tool name.

name: run_show_command
description: Safe escape hatch — run an arbitrary SONiC 'show …' command via SSH. Strictly validated: must start with 'show ', only alphanumerics and a small set of safe punctuation allowed, no shell metacharacters, no quotes, 256-char limit. Prefer dedicated tools when available.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

command.description: SONiC show command, e.g. 'show platform summary' or 'show vlan brief'.
